message.content:
@startuml
!define CLASS(name) [C] name
!define CLASS_FIELD(name, type) name: type

CLASS "Station" {
  CLASS_FIELD(id, String)
  CLASS_FIELD(name, String)
  CLASS_FIELD(latitude, String)
  CLASS_FIELD(longitude, String)
  CLASS_FIELD(dockCount, String)
  CLASS_FIELD(city, String)
  CLASS_FIELD(installationDate, String)
}

CLASS "Status" {
  CLASS_FIELD(bikesAvailable, Int)
  CLASS_FIELD(docksAvailable, Int)
  CLASS_FIELD(time, Int)
}

CLASS "Trip" {
  CLASS_FIELD(id, String)
  CLASS_FIELD(duration, String)
  CLASS_FIELD(startDate, String)
  CLASS_FIELD(startStationName, String)
  CLASS_FIELD(startStationId, String)
  CLASS_FIELD(endDate, String)
  CLASS_FIELD(endStationName, String)
  CLASS_FIELD(endStationId, String)
  CLASS_FIELD(bikeId, String)
  CLASS_FIELD(subscriptionType, String)
  CLASS_FIELD(zipCode, String)
}

CLASS "Weather" {
  CLASS_FIELD(date, Int)
  CLASS_FIELD(maxTemperatureF, Int)
  CLASS_FIELD(meanTemperatureF, Int)
  CLASS_FIELD(minTemperatureF, Int)
  CLASS_FIELD(maxDewPointF, Int)
  CLASS_FIELD(meanDewPointF, Int)
  CLASS_FIELD(minDewPointF, Int)
  CLASS_FIELD(maxHumidity, Int)
  CLASS_FIELD(meanHumidity, Int)
  CLASS_FIELD(minHumidity, Int)
  CLASS_FIELD(maxSeaLevelPressureInches, Int)
  CLASS_FIELD(meanSeaLevelPressureInches, Int)
  CLASS_FIELD(minSeaLevelPressureInches, Int)
  CLASS_FIELD(maxVisibilityMiles, Int)
  CLASS_FIELD(meanVisibilityMiles, Int)
  CLASS_FIELD(minVisibilityMiles, Int)
  CLASS_FIELD(maxWindSpeedMph, Int)
  CLASS_FIELD(meanWindSpeedMph, Int)
  CLASS_FIELD(maxGustSpeedMph, Int)
  CLASS_FIELD(precipitationInches, Int)
  CLASS_FIELD(cloudCover, Int)
  CLASS_FIELD(events, Int)
  CLASS_FIELD(windDirDegrees, Int)
  CLASS_FIELD(zipCode, Int)
}

Station "1" -- "*" Status
@enduml
